reference: Bala, durnya naa do mindɔrɛ bɩ, hɔɔzaabaa m Woso mɩm ʊ. Amba n y'a gʊrsɩra ba Wosoci b'ʊ sɔ, n ʊ: «Woso ɩ mindɔrɛzannɔ kum hɔɔnkarɛ zi kʊ ŋ n'a bam bɩ nɔ ʊ.»
hypothesis: Balla, duniya nade mini dore be. Ho za ba muso mini, ambaya ko risa ba wusu cibu so ongo. Wusu e mini dore za no kuno hoke risikun na bambe no.

reference: N y'a ya, n n a gʊrsɩra ba sɔ, n ʊ: «Zuuba mindɔrɛzannɔ hɔɔndarɛrɔ dɔ. A a dɔ a ʊ, ŋ nyɔɔdʊ ba ʊ y.»
hypothesis: Yaya na golsera basoo onoo, zube mindora isa noohordere do. Adowa o nyodo bawo

reference: Ncɩnaaʊ bɩ, gɔsɩ b'a lɛ bɔ a mɩŋŋa ʊ, gʊɔɔ tɔ ma y, bala, awɔɔ hɔ m hɔ haay m.
hypothesis: Janabi, vos va alle bon mengo? Bo tomé? Bala! Awo homho haayim?

reference: Kʊ Pol m, gɛɛ Apolɔs m, gɛɛ Sefas m, awɔɔ hɔɔ m, kʊ durnya m gɛɛ mɩsɩrbaa m, gɛɛ zɛ m, kʊ her-her dɔmɩm naa m, gɛɛ bootirɔ dɔmɩnnɔ m, woo… naa awɔɔ hɔ m.
hypothesis: Apollo. Ge a polloson. Ge a sefasom. Awo hom. O dunye ge mesirba. Ge a sem. O he re doma nam. Ge buturo doma nom. Wo na awo hom.

reference: Bɩ, k'awɔɔ nɩ, Krista y'a so awɔɔ ʊ, Woso n a so Krista ʊ.
hypothesis: kawon krista suwawa musuna su krista

reference: Mɔɔ ma n n'a dɩndam lɛɛ kar ʊ, n ʊ, gʊaa ɩ jaan da awɔɔ barla, bɩ gʊɔɔ kʊ kristagʊɔɔ bɛɛ m nɔ wɔɔ bɩ yɛrɛ ŋn'ɩ jaandarɛ naa do lɔɔ da y, k'an bʊnyaa maam-maam bɩ tɔ ma. A dɩnda n nawʊrɛ, n ʊ, awɔɔ gʊaa deem nɩ kan a zɩ lʊ kɩ.
hypothesis: Mooma nanden dan le karo ongo, wey jada o bala bi goku Kristo go ben no wo be yele ni jadare na adulla day. Kambuya mama mi toma, adundan naure ongo, aguadii ni kanasi luku

reference: A ga a wʊm k'awɔɔ heer n a zar, a nyi ka mimbʊnyaa k'an awɔɔ bire ʊ bɩ minto, a gʊaa k'a naa ba bɩ bɔ a zi, an bɔkarɛ, awɔɔ bɩ to an n'a mɩŋŋɔɔ busum.
hypothesis: A gã un ka o he nazan, anyi kɛ mi mbuya ka o na o bɛ rɔ bi mi to. Agua ka na ba bɛ bozi, am bɔ kare o bito anan mi ngo busu.

reference: Mɔɔ ba b'ʊ kan awɔɔ kɩ y, bɩ mɔɔ heer ɩ kan awɔɔ kɩ, ncɩnaaʊ bɩ, mɔɔ gʊaa k'a mim naa do ba bɩ dʊdɔ yar, ɩ ʊ b'ʊ mɔɔ n ta ʊ kan awɔɔ kɩ.
hypothesis: Moo bobe kana oki? Bimo heri kana oki? Nchinabe. Mo gwaka mina do babe dodo yar. Eubu monto kana oki.

reference: K'awɔɔ b'a so kʊ ma k'a mim naa do dɩnda, mɔɔ heer nyɩntam kan awɔɔ kɩ, wakatɩ bɩ do ʊ bɩ, k'a gʊaa bɩ do dʊdɔ yar Zuuba Yeezuu tɔ kan a paŋŋa kɩ m.
hypothesis: Kaoba suko ma kamma din da mo hernyin ta kanawoki, waka tabidobi, ka gwa bidododo yaru suba yesu to kanapanga ki.

reference: K'a gʊaa bɩ do da Sʊtaana wɔ ʊ, k'a mɛsim n a zaar ba, k'a nyi bɩ n a da ma an bʊmbɔrɛ yɩ hinni kʊ Zuuba n nɩ zɛŋ ʊ b'ʊ.
hypothesis: Ka gwabudu da sutana wo, ka misinaza ba, ka nyibina dama ambu mbo rayi hinni kuso banizi ngobo.

reference: Awɔɔ n a ga m hɔɔ, a a mɩŋŋɔɔ busu y. N ʊ: «Nyʊnyɔɔ poore tɔkkɛ ɩ nyisi derm haay.» Awɔɔ n bɔɔr naa do dɔ ra?
hypothesis: Aonakã ho, amingbo sui. Ongoo, minyo kwo tokeyi nyiside rem haye. Aonbor nadodara.

reference: Naa tɔ ma bɩ, k'a mimbʊnyaa haay k'ɩ ʊ nyʊnyɔɔ gusire m bɩ bɔ a bire ʊ, k'a a da ma, a yɩ mɩŋŋa-mɩŋŋa ɩ ʊ, nyisi daa kʊ n n nyʊnyɔɔ da ma bɩ m. Bala, sɩra nɔ ʊ, Woso awɔɔ hu bɔ, Yeezuu Krista zɛ bɩ tɔ ma. Yeezuu Krista bɔ kʊ ʊ kan sinnyɛɛm kʊ n tɩr a zɛ mannɩ pakkɩ cibsa ma bɩ kɩ.
hypothesis: na toma bii kamin buniya haii ki wunyu gusunre mbe boa bireu sa dama aye menga menga eo nyisi takunyu dama bom bala serano o gusa o hubou yesu krista seve toma yesu krista boko kan sinye contre ma ne paque tise ma veke

reference: Ʊ ʊ pakkɩ cibsa bɩ bɩ, bɩ, ʊ b'a bɩ bur kʊ nyʊnyɔɔ gusire n ta ma bɩ nɩ y. Nyʊnyɔɔ gusire bɩ do bɔ kʊ ʊ, ɩ ʊ, mimbʊnyaabarɛ m kan mɩsɩrbaa bʊnyaa barɛ kɩ. Bɩ, ʊ ʊ cibsa bɩ bɩ bur kʊ n n nyʊnyɔɔ da ma m, naa k'a hɩ a ʊ, heer hu nɔ ʊ, sɩra nɔ ʊ.
hypothesis: O, ba ti gisi gbe be, o ba be buru kun nyin gbusere tan mabene. Nyi o gbusere be du boko e o, ni mbuya bare kan mesere ba bunya bare ke be o gisi gbe be buru kun nyin o damam. Na ka ya o heru hunu sarano.

reference: Ci kʊ mɔɔ nyɩnta m a ba awɔɔ ma bɩ nɔ ʊ bɩ, mɔɔ hɩ awɔɔ m mɔɔ ʊ, a b'a zɛ kʊ ra kan jaandər kɩ y.
hypothesis: Jukku mo yen tama ba wo ma bi noo bi, mo yi haa wo moo, a baa sekora kan di e der ki.

reference: Durnyazannɔ kʊ jaandənno m, mɩnyɔɔzannɔ m, ŋnɩ konno, ŋn'ɩ yaa dam *wosobaawɔnnɔ m nɔ wɔɔ, brɔɔ bɛɛ mɔɔ ʊ a b'a zɛ kʊ ra kan ŋ kɩ y. Kʊ gʊaa ʊ, a b'a lɛ dam nawɔnnɔ ʊ, pakra m k'an bɔ durnya ʊ, kʊ n bɛɛ m a wer ta ʊ.
hypothesis: Duniya sanni, koyi jere nono, mini yoso nono, o ni kono, o ni yadanwusa bawo nonowo, borobere mo aba se ko kaneke, ogwawo abalere nono wowo, kakaranka boduniya, ko bema aweta.

reference: Ayy… durnyazannɔ wɔɔ bɛɛ mɔɔ hɩ ŋ ma y, bɩ gʊaa k'a ʊ danyɩ n a mɩ Krista zuure nɔ ʊ, an bɔkarɛ, jaandər m, gɛɛ mɩnyɔɔzaa, gɛɛ an nɩ yaa dam wosobaawɔnnɔ m, gɛɛ tɔzarlɛzaa, gɛɛ bɛɛmirewaasɩzaa, gɛɛ hɔyɔrɛzaa bɩ. Bɩ zaa mɔɔ hɩ ma, baa kʊ hɔbɩrɛ m, a b'a zɛ kʊ ra kan kɩ y.
hypothesis: Ayii drizra noyo be mohoema, be kwakawu danyi na mi kristosi re no, ambokare jandre, ge mine yosa, ge aniyadan wuso bawo nom, ge tosere sa, ge bemere wosa sa, ge hoyore sabi bissa mohema bako ho brem abase kora kanke.

reference: Mɔɔ bɛɛ n nɩ gʊɔɔ kʊ kristagʊɔɔ bɛɛ nɩ ŋ mɩ rɔ wɔɔ dʊdɔ yarlɛ y. B'awɔɔ a ga m, a gʊɔɔ kʊ ŋ n'awɔɔ sokʊma nɔ ʊ rɔ wɔɔ dʊdɔ yar.
hypothesis: Mobeeno koku krista gobeena miirwo tu do yallee. Bawogam, akooku nawoosukuma nooro wotudo yallee.

reference: Kʊ durnyazannɔ wɔɔ nɩ, Woso n nɩ brɔɔ dʊdɔ yarm. K'a hɔ kʊ Wosoci b'a hɩ bɩ ba, a a hɩ, a ʊ: «K'a la gʊaa k'a n'a bʊnyaa bam bɩ ra a bɔ a barla.»
hypothesis: pùduré yàà nùwóní, wusuní boròródé yàrèm. Ká hokú wusuní cíbàá hébébá aà hé aàw. Ká lagwá kánà bùyà bámbrábò bárla.
